title: Anchorage Earthquake UPDATE #2: Ahtna Anchorage Office to Reopen on Tuesday, December 4
summary: The Ahtna Anchorage office will resume normal business and reopen Tuesday, December 4, 2018. Ahtna staff should check their email for more details and the status of roadways along their route before traveling. The safety of our employees and those we work with is our top priority and if staff feels...

title: Upcoming Events hosted by CNFAIC!!
summary: Stories from Sunburst at Powder Hound Ski Shop, Girdwood - FREE. December 18 @ 6:30 pm - 8:00 pm. Join Heather Thamm, for an evening discussion on avalanche safety and awareness.

title: Bluedog
summary: December 3, 2018 Bluedog is a family band based out of the twin cities, Minneapolis and St. Paul, Minnesota.
